info.title: task-runner
info.description: Runs a task based on the provided configuration.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to the task configuration file. Default: "task-runner.yaml".

options.name: --init
options.description: Initialize the task configuration file if it does not exist. Default: "False".

options.name: --list
options.description: List available tasks in the configuration file. Default: "False".

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Run tasks in parallel if set to true. Default: "False".

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch for file changes and re-run tasks if set to true. Default: "False".

arguments.name: tasknames
arguments.description: Names of the task(s) to run. Default: .
